---
title: "analyzer.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.ts"
loc: 217
complexity: 31
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 3.47
overall_score: 1.56
---

## Intent
Calculates structural logic density using CC and nesting metrics.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getParser](file://./parser.js)
- [TreeSitter](file://./parser.js)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [calculateLogicScore](file://./calculus/logic.js)
- [calculateStyleScore](file://./calculus/style.js)
- [calculateIntelScore](file://./calculus/intel.js)

### Exports
- `analyzeFile`
- `analyzeFile`
- `loc`
- `hash`
- `endpoints`
- `isApi`
- `docResult`
- `gravity`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `complexity`
- `maxNesting`
- `imports`
- `exports`
- `complexityQuerySource`
- `complexityQuery`
- `matches`
- `traverse`
- `i`
- `child`
- `pyQuery`
- `pyMatches`
- `node`
- `jsQuery`
- `jsMatches`
- `node`
- `sourceNodes`
- `src`
- `specifiers`
- `importedNode`
- `aliasNode`
- `imported`
- `local`
- `idNode`
- `idNodes`
- `filtered`
- `logicValue`
- `style`
- `intel`
- `gravity`
- `anomalyScore`
- `penalty`
- `overall`
- `detectEndpoints`
- `endpoints`
- `routeRegex`
- `nextJsRegex`
- `fastapiRegex`
- `match`
- `rel`
- `getSystemAnomaly`
- `statePath`
- `raw`
- `data`
- `getFileGravity`
- `gravityPath`
- `raw`
- `data`
- `normalized`
- `analyzeMarkdown`
- `imports`
- `exports`
- `linkRegex`
- `match`
- `nameMatch`
- `calculateLOC`
- `isPython`
- `commentRegex`
- `cleanCode`
- `content`
